description_long: This is a modern rectangular bathroom sink unit with a vessel-style basin mounted on top of a wide, boxy vanity. The vanity features two large horizontal drawers with clean, handle-less fronts, providing ample storage space. The basin is square with straight edges and sits above a flat countertop that appears to be made of a different material, possibly stone or composite. A single-lever faucet is mounted at the rear of the basin, and the plumbing is visible from the rear view, indicating a functional setup. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on geometric lines and a neutral color palette, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as public restrooms, commercial buildings, or upscale residential complexes.
description: A modern rectangular vessel sink with a wide, handle-less vanity and a single-lever faucet, featuring a minimalist design and neutral tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the vanity and the vessel basin sitting atop the countertop.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two large drawers and the centered vessel basin with faucet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the basin and faucet profile.
description_view_3: Rear view exposing the plumbing and the open backs of the drawers, revealing internal structure.
